creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery (ports committer)
Date: Tue Aug  7 13:28:26 2012
New Revision: 39334
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39334

Log:
  Fix invalid PORT_OPTIONS references
  
  PR:		docs/170427
  Reported by:	"A.J. Kehoe IV (Nanoman)" <k4z2ojm6@nanoman.ca>
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)
  Approved by:	gjb

Modified:
  head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml

Modified: head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml
==============================================================================
--- head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml	Tue Aug  7 11:11:35 2012	(r39333)
+++ head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml	Tue Aug  7 13:28:26 2012	(r39334)
@@ -3909,7 +3909,7 @@ BAR_DESC=	Enable bar support
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-.if ${PORTOPTIONS:MBAR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBAR}
 LIB_DEPENDS=	bar:${PORTSDIR}/foo/bar
 .endif</programlisting>
 	</example>
